sentence: Güei nu está bonu el tiempu.
ipa: ˈɡwei ˈnu eˈsta ˈbonu el ˈtjempu
gloss_en: Today the weather is not good.
notes: Estremeñu 'güei' (today), tonic diphthong ie [je] in 'tiempu' and final -o>-u raising 'bonu'/'tiempu' per zamora_vicente1960; base phonology per penny2002.

gloss_en: These shoes cost forty euros.
notes: Seseo z>[s] in 'zapatus' and coda-/s/ aspiration [h] 'estus'/'zapatus' per zamora_vicente1960; /s/ weakening described in penny2002.

sentence: La junta es manana a las tres.
ipa: la ˈxunta ˈeh maˈnana a lah ˈtɾeh
gloss_en: The meeting is tomorrow at three.
notes: Coda /s/>[h] in 'es'/'las'/'tres' per zamora_vicente1960; velar [x] retained in 'junta' per alarcos_llorach1994.

sentence: Mi familia vivi en un pueblu.
ipa: mi haˈmilja ˈbibi en un ˈpweblu
gloss_en: My family lives in a village.
notes: F->h aspiration 'familia' [haˈmilja], diphthong ue [we] in 'pueblu' and final -u 'pueblu' per zamora_vicente1960; F->h history per penny2002.

sentence: Vaiti tou drechu hasta la ilesia.
ipa: ˈbajti ˈtou ˈdɾetʃu ˈasta la iˈlesja
gloss_en: Go straight to the church.
notes: Estremeñu imperative 'vaiti', 'drechu' (straight) with -CT->[tʃ] and final -u per zamora_vicente1960; 'hasta' with mute h per alarcos_llorach1994.

gloss_en: This bread is very good.
notes: Reduced intensifier 'mu' (muy) and prosthetic güe- 'güenu' with final -u per zamora_vicente1960; register per penny2002.

gloss_en: Where is the market?
notes: Estremeñu interrogative 'andi' (dónde) and final -o>-u with -d- loss 'mercau' per zamora_vicente1960; syncope per alarcos_llorach1994.

gloss_en: How old are you?
notes: Palatal ñ>[ɲ] in 'años', diphthong ie in 'tienis', coda /s/>[h] per zamora_vicente1960; final -e>-i raising per penny2002.

sentence: Si lluevi, mus quearemus en casa.
ipa: si ˈjwebi ˈmuh keaˈɾemuh en ˈkasa
gloss_en: If it rains, we will stay at home.
notes: Yeismo ll>[j] in 'lluevi', diphthong ue [we], coda /s/ aspiration 'mus'/'quearemus' per zamora_vicente1960; intervocalic -d- loss 'quearemus' per alarcos_llorach1994.

gloss_en: Yesterday I bought bread and cheese.
notes: Yeismo prevocalic y>[ʝ] in 'ayel', seseo c>[s] in 'mercé' and final -u 'quesu' per zamora_vicente1960; conjunction 'i' per alarcos_llorach1994.

gloss_en: Tomorrow we will go to the city.
notes: Seseo c>[s] in 'ciudá' (with final -d loss), coda /s/>[h] in 'diremus' per zamora_vicente1960; syncope per penny2002.

gloss_en: Call me later, man.
notes: Imperative + enclitic 'llámami' (ll>[j]), diphthong ue [we] in 'luegu' and final -u per zamora_vicente1960; final -e>-i 'hombri' per penny2002.

gloss_en: Hello, how are you?
notes: Greeting 'buenas' (ue [we]), coda /s/>[h] 'buenas'/'estás', final -o>-u 'cómu' per zamora_vicente1960; vowel-junction 'cómu estás' per alarcos_llorach1994.

gloss_en: Whoever grasps at too much loses it all.
notes: Proverb; diphthong ie in 'quien'/'aprieta' per zamora_vicente1960; elision 'much abarca'/'poco aprieta' per alarcos_llorach1994.

gloss_en: The dog runs down the street.
notes: Geminate rr>trill [r] in 'perru', final -o>-u 'perru' and yeismo ll>[j] 'calli' per zamora_vicente1960; trill per penny2002.

gloss_en: The girl plays in the field.
notes: Palatal ñ>[ɲ] 'niña', diphthong ue [we] in 'juega' ([x] jota) and final -u 'campu' per zamora_vicente1960; contraction 'enel' per alarcos_llorach1994.

gloss_en: The blackbirds sing in the morning.
notes: Coda /s/>[h] in 'los'/'mirlus', final -o>-u 'mirlus' per zamora_vicente1960; contraction 'pola' (por la) per alarcos_llorach1994.

gloss_en: It was very cold (lit. it made great ice).
notes: Seseo z>[s] 'hizu' (mute h), velar [x] 'jelu', final -o>-u 'hizu'/'jelu' per zamora_vicente1960; junction 'hizu un' per penny2002.

gloss_en: The mountains are very beautiful.
notes: Diphthong ie [je] in 'sierra' with geminate rr>trill [r], F->h 'hermosa' per zamora_vicente1960; F->h history per penny2002.

sentence: Esa muyer es la mi vecina.
ipa: ˈesa muˈʝeɾ ˈeh la mi beˈsina
gloss_en: That woman is my neighbour.
notes: Yeismo 'muyer' (y>[ʝ]), seseo c>[s] 'vecina', coda /s/>[h] 'es', double determiner 'la mi' per zamora_vicente1960; register per alarcos_llorach1994.
